description: Dispatch litigation work to legal-services vendors from any MCP-compatible AI workflow.
name: io.github.jackgillen15-dev/scope-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Scope API. Defaults to the hosted instance.
environmentVariables.name: SCOPE_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token from scope-bid.vercel.app/settings. Required for write tools (scope_dispatch_matter). Read-only tools work without it on demo matters.
environmentVariables.name: SCOPE_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Pin reads/writes to a specific buyer organization. Useful for multi-tenant deployments.
environmentVariables.name: SCOPE_ORG_SLUG

title: Scope
